import asyncio
from database import engine, Base
from models.models import Project, BomLine, QwPrice, CbomRow, NreLine, ExInvRow, User

async def reset\(\):
    async with engine.begin\(\) as conn:
        await conn.run_sync\(Base.metadata.drop_all\)
        await conn.run_sync\(Base.metadata.create_all\)
    print\('Tables recreated'\)

asyncio.run\(reset\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\BuLLMQuote - UI\\bullmquote\\backend" && python -c "
import asyncio
from database import get_db
from models.models import User
from sqlalchemy import select
from passlib.context import CryptContext

pwd_ctx = CryptContext\(schemes=['bcrypt'], deprecated='auto'\)

async def test\(\):
    async for db in get_db\(\):
        result = await db.execute\(select\(User\).where\(User.username == 'admin'\)\)
        user = result.scalar_one_or_none\(\)
        if user:
            print\('Username:', user.username\)
            print\('Hashed pw:', user.hashed_pw[:60] if user.hashed_pw else 'NONE'\)
            print\('Verifies bullm@2025:', pwd_ctx.verify\('bullm@2025', user.hashed_pw\) if user.hashed_pw else False\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
